_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Detection of calculi or foreign bodies (multiple stone in glands)
Determination of extent of destruction of salivary gland
Recurrent swelling in floor of mouth with discharge of fluid

preauth.label: Clinical notes (detailing signs, symptoms, examination findings, indications for doing the procedure & advise for admission) including pre-op photos (intraoral and extraoral)
Document required for Investigation of Ranula: (X-ray of the Ranula OR Conventional Radiography (X-ray))

claim.label: Post-operative Photograph of the affected parts (intraoral and extraoral and of excised tissue(Ranula)) OR Histopathology of the excised tissue

ppd_preauth.q: Detailed Clinical notes (including clinical signs & symptoms, examination findings, indications for doing the procedure & advise for admission)?
Radiological Imaging for presence of Ranula?

cpd_claim.q: OT notes detail the steps of surgery performed and outcomes of the surgery?
Documents available to show appropriate post-op care, advise including for follow-up?
Post-op Photo (intraoral, extraoral) of affected part submitted?
Histopathology of the excised tissue to confirm the complete removal of Ranula?

common_queries: Signs, symptoms, examination, or imaging (X-Ray/USG/Radiological Imaging) not confirming the presence of Ranula.
Conservative or medical management failure/non-indication not documented.
Pre-operative photos (intraoral/extraoral) are missing or unclear.
Post-operative photo of affected parts (intraoral/extraoral) OR histopathology report of excised tissue is missing/incomplete.
Operative notes are missing or do not detail surgical steps and outcomes.

clinical_key_pointers: Proceed for Surgery only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical signs, symptoms, examination.
